name: Plank
based_on: A SaaS product changelog in the Linear / Stripe / Clerk style — dated entries, New/Improved/Fixed category badges, tag filtering, and an RSS feed.
summary: A calm, dated changelog for a markdown notes app, with category badges, client-side tag filtering, inline screenshots per release, and subscribe-by-RSS/email links.
sections: Header — product name, one-liner, and Subscribe (RSS + email) actions
Filter bar — toggle by New / Improved / Fixed
Release timeline — dated entries with version, badge, title, description, and optional screenshot
Footer subscribe block and RSS link
setup_questions: What's the product name and a one-line description of what it does?
Give me 3-4 recent release notes — version, date, category, and what changed.
Where should 'subscribe to updates' point (email signup URL or just RSS)?
